# Title 25 - Public Health and Environment

## Article 7 - Air Quality Control

### Part 1 - General Provisions

#### 25-7-109. Commission - powers and duties.

(1) The commission shall promulgate rules necessary for the proper implementation and
administration of this article 7.

(2) The commission may consult with any person who is subject to requirements under
25-7-114 before adopting rules.

#### 25-7-114. Emission control regulations.

(1) The commission may adopt emission control regulations applicable to stationary sources.

(2) A person subject to an emission control regulation shall comply with the schedule
stated in the regulation.
